overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running through a swampy forest trail transitioning to a hillside path. The environment features misty wetlands, dense woods, and a brief view of a campsite, with high-quality game engine rendering and dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty swamp with dead trees and wooden posts

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily through the foggy marshland with swords on his back

entered.detail: tall dead trees without leaves scattered throughout the swamp
weathered wooden posts sticking out of the marshy ground
large fallen tree trunks lying across the path
low-lying fog hovering over the swamp water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a misty swamp environment with dead leafless trees and wooden posts emerging from the marshy ground. Geralt runs forward along a dirt trail through the foggy wetland, with tall grass and scattered logs visible along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest with ancient stone ruins

events.description: environment transitions from open swamp to denser forest with living pine trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing through the darker forest path with dense vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: tall green pine trees forming a dense forest wall
ancient stone structures and archways visible through the trees
thick ferns and bushes lining the forest path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a denser forest environment with living pine trees replacing the dead swamp vegetation. Ancient stone ruins become visible in the distance as Geralt runs along the winding dirt path surrounded by thick undergrowth.

events.description: campsite with tents and NPCs becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt running past a campsite with people gathered near tents on the left

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and interacting near the camp tents

entered.detail: wooden platforms and temporary structures built for the camp
canvas tents set up in a clearing beside the path
smoke rising from campfires within the settlement

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a clearing where a temporary campsite appears on the left with tents and NPCs gathered around fires. Geralt continues running past the camp as the environment becomes sunnier and more open.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with panoramic views

events.description: path ascends onto an open grassy hillside with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: Geralt running uphill on an open grassy trail with increasing elevation

entered.detail: sloping grassy terrain with wildflowers covering the hills
rocks and boulders scattered across the hillside path
mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to an open grassy hillside as the path ascends. The campsite falls behind and the landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains and a winding trail through the sunlit grass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty swamp that gradually ascends into a bright, open hillside. It begins with Geralt running along a dirt trail through a foggy wetland filled with dead, leafless trees and wooden posts emerging from the marsh. As the path winds forward, the dead vegetation gives way to a denser forest of living pine trees and thick undergrowth, with ancient stone ruins appearing in the distance. The scene then opens into a sunnier clearing where the camera passes a temporary campsite of tents and fires before the terrain begins to climb. Finally, the landscape expands into a wide, grassy hillside under clear light, revealing distant mountains as the trail ascends.
